subcodes.first_line: O sapling of the Abhá Paradise! Through His ancient grace and mighty bounty, I hope from the Ancient One that from the downpour of His cloud [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال جنت ابهی از لطف قدیم و فضل عظیم ذات قدیم امیدوارم که از فیض سحاب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
